summary: Frontend-only regression on MaskLineScroll reveal fix + reduced spacing. All 11 section headings render visibly with full height (~120-144px) and inner spans have no residual translateY after scrolling into view. No large empty gaps between eyebrow labels and headings. Nav jump, service/FAQ accordions, contact validation toast, and mobile menu all working. No console errors.
verified_flows: All 11 headings visible after gradual scroll (Manifesto, Why, Services, Methodology, Solutions, Industries, Tech/Partners, Insights, FAQ, Offices, Contact) — spans_translated=0 for every heading
Header nav-services smooth-scrolled to y≈3952 and heading is visible on landing
Services accordion (service-toggle-0) expands (panel height 591px, Cloud Computing content shown)
Contact form empty submit shows toast: 'Please share your name and email.'
Mobile menu (390x844) opens revealing Manifesto/Services/Solutions/Partners/Offices links + GET IN TOUCH
No console errors during full top-to-bottom scroll
critical_code_review_comments: stats testids: only 'stats-section' wrapper testid exists; individual counters lack per-stat data-testid (e.g., stat-clients, stat-projects). Recommend adding for future assertions.
Counter values (250+, 120+, 16, 40+) appear rendered as split character/span structure making text-based scraping brittle — add data-testid on each stat number span.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MaskLineScroll parent-observer fix is confirmed working. All section headings reliably reveal on scroll. If future issues arise, check that motion.span.line-mask wrapper (untransformed) is the whileInView target, not the animated inner span. Individual stat counters lack data-testid for direct assertion; verify via visible text screenshots.
rca of the issue: Previous bug: whileInView observer sat on the y:110% translated span, causing intersection to fail intermittently → headings stayed invisible → looked like large empty spacing. Fix moved observer to stable parent .line-mask wrapper with variants driving the inner span. Verified: 100% of headings show height ~120-144px with no translated inner spans.
